overall.description: A slow forward walk along a futuristic waterfront promenade in a cyberpunk city, featuring a massive spherical structure floating in the water and towering glass skyscrapers. The scene is rendered in a game engine with cinematic lighting, showing clear skies and distant flying vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic waterfront promenade overlooking spherical offshore structure

events.description: A small flying drone enters from the upper left and flies across the sky toward the city center

agents.ego_description: Moving steadily forward along the elevated waterfront promenade, approaching the spherical structure while observing the distant skyline

notable_agents.action: Large hovering airship maintaining position above the distant city skyline

entered.detail: Tall futuristic skyscraper with dark reflective glass facade and red accent lighting running vertically
Massive white spherical building floating in the water with red geometric markings on its surface
Dense cluster of futuristic high-rise buildings fading into atmospheric haze on the horizon
Sleek flying vehicle hovering stationary in the sky above the downtown district
Cluster of cylindrical white storage tanks situated on the dock between the promenade and the spherical structure

segments.scene_description: The camera walks steadily along a futuristic waterfront promenade bordered by a massive dark glass skyscraper on the left. The view opens toward a large spherical offshore structure sitting in calm waters, with a dense cyberpunk skyline visible in the hazy distance. A hovering airship maintains position above the city while a small flying drone crosses the sky midway through the segment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a steady forward progression along a futuristic waterfront that gradually reveals the scale of a sprawling cyberpunk metropolis. It begins with a walk beside a massive dark glass skyscraper, where the perspective opens up toward a large spherical structure resting in the calm offshore waters. As the camera advances, the hazy distance clarifies to unveil a dense skyline of towering buildings under a clear sky. The scene then expands to include a hovering airship maintaining its position above the city before a small flying drone crosses the frame, completing the sense of a living, high-tech environment.
